title: Republic Services 2025 Form 10-K

title: Republic Services Reports Fourth Quarter and Full-Year 2025 Results
note: Investor release supporting 2025 line-of-business revenue context and profitability discussion.

title: Residential Trash & Garbage Service

title: Republic Services Market Capitalization
note: Market capitalization and market-rank source used for current market-cap metric.

note: Trailing P/E source used for valuation metric.

title: Open Source at Our Core
note: Documents GraphHopper routing engine and jsprit as open-source routing and vehicle-routing projects.

title: graphhopper/jsprit
note: Repository for the open-source jsprit vehicle-routing solver relevant to collection-route optimization.

title: Solid Waste Optimization Life-cycle Framework in Python
note: Documents SwolfPy as a free open-source solid waste management LCA and optimization framework.

title: SwolfPy-Project/swolfpy
note: Repository and license source for SwolfPy.

title: Precious Plastic
note: Open community recycling model with machines, workspaces, business tools, starter kits, and Creative Commons-shared content.
